text.title: API Gateway Observability Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the api-gateway-observability methodology end-to-end.

step.name: pick-stack
step.action: Confirm Prometheus + OTLP-compatible backend reachable from gateway nodes.
step.decision-gate: If backend not reachable, block — observability without sink is folklore.

step.name: enable-metrics
step.action: Enable Prometheus plugin; set histogram buckets matching SLO thresholds.

step.name: configure-json-logs
step.action: Switch to JSON access logs; include correlation_id, consumer_id, status, latency fields.

step.name: wire-tracing
step.action: Enable OpenTelemetry exporter with tracecontext propagator; set sample_ratio.
step.decision-gate: If sample_ratio > 0.2 in prod, escalate — backend cost risk.

step.name: publish-slo-dashboard
step.action: Author Grafana dashboard with request rate, latency p50/p95/p99, error rate, SLO burn-rate panels.
